invalid_system_mode.message: The mode `{mode}` is not supported by this controller

mode_does_not_support_duration.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support `duration`; use `{attribute}` instead

mode_does_not_support_period.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support `period`; use `{attribute}` instead

mode_does_not_support_temporary.message: The mode `{mode}` can only be set permanently

deprecated_service.description: The `{service}` service is deprecated and will stop working in a future version of Home Assistant. Update your automations and scripts to use the equivalent entity service instead.
deprecated_service.title: Evohome service call is deprecated

clear_zone_override.description: Sets a zone to follow its schedule.
clear_zone_override.name: Clear zone override

refresh_controller.description: Pulls the latest data from the vendor's servers now, rather than waiting for the next scheduled update.
refresh_controller.name: Refresh controller

refresh_system.description: Deprecated: use refresh_controller instead. Pulls the latest data from the vendor's servers.
refresh_system.name: Refresh system (deprecated)

reset_controller.description: Sets the controller to Auto mode and resets all the zones to follow their schedules.
reset_controller.name: Reset controller

reset_system.description: Deprecated: use reset_controller instead. Sets the system to Auto mode and resets all the zones to follow their schedules.
reset_system.name: Reset system (deprecated)

set_controller_mode.description: Sets the controller mode, either indefinitely, or for a specified period of time, after which it will revert to Auto. Not all systems support all modes.

duration.description: The duration in hours; used only with AutoWithEco mode (up to 24 hours).
duration.name: Duration

mode.description: Mode to set the controller to.
mode.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::mode%]

period.description: A period of time in days; used only with Away, DayOff, or Custom mode. The controller will revert to Auto mode at midnight (up to 99 days, today is day 1).
period.name: Period

set_controller_mode.name: Set controller mode

set_system_mode.description: Deprecated: use set_controller_mode instead. Sets the system mode.

duration.description: The duration in hours; used only with AutoWithEco mode (up to 24 hours).
duration.name: Duration

mode.description: Mode to set the system to.
mode.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::mode%]

period.description: A period of time in days; used only with Away, DayOff, or Custom mode. The system will revert to Auto mode at midnight (up to 99 days, today is day 1).
period.name: Period

set_system_mode.name: Set system mode (deprecated)

set_zone_override.description: Overrides a zone's setpoint, either indefinitely, or for a specified period of time, after which it will revert to following its schedule.

duration.description: The zone will revert to its schedule after this time. If 0 the change is until the next scheduled setpoint.
duration.name: Duration

setpoint.description: The temperature to be used instead of the scheduled setpoint.
setpoint.name: Setpoint

set_zone_override.name: Set zone override
